creator: wessels@packet-pushers.com
text:
On Wed, 4 Oct 2000 root@monsta.privatelabs.com wrote:
  
 > 	Squid should, of course, fix this ASAP. But until that happens,
 > 	dropping the following into /usr/ports/www/squid23/patches/patch-pl
 > 	will ensure the port builds on *BSD:
 
 This has been fixed since Aug 10.  The patch is posted here:
 
 http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v2/2.3/bugs/#squid-2.3.stable4-ipfw_configure
